text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff... I can't... I should stop here...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
But I... I love it so much... It's calling me<n>back
already...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
...Okay, a short break, and then one<n>more lap.
That shouldn't count as<n>overworking myself...
right?
